method.hint: How this expiration is checked when its event fires.
method.label: Method

formula.hint: Formula rolled when checking this expiration.
formula.label: Roll Formula

threshold.hint: The roll must satisfy the comparison against this threshold to expire.
threshold.label: Threshold

event.hint: Event that makes this effect expire.
event.label: Event

relation.hint: Relationship between this effect and the expiration.
relation.label: Relation

skip.hint: Number of instances of this event to skip before expiring.
skip.label: Skip

timing.hint: Timing of the event that makes this effect expire.
timing.label: Timing

absent.hint: This expires if the actor doesn't have any of these conditions.
absent.label: Absent Conditions

present.hint: This expires if the actor has any of these conditions.
present.label: Present Conditions

triggers.hint: This expires when any of the selected triggers occur.
triggers.label: Triggers
